rationale: PR title 'fix: forward ALLOW_INSECURE_GIT_ACCESS to agent server' addresses #14523 by adding an exact-name allowlist to get_agent_server_env() in openhands/app_server/sandbox/sandbox_spec_service.py. The diff adds AUTO_FORWARD_EXACT_VARS = ('ALLOW_INSECURE_GIT_ACCESS',) alongside the existing AUTO_FORWARD_PREFIXES tuple, updates the docstring, and modifies the Step 1 loop to check `key in AUTO_FORWARD_EXACT_VARS or any(key.startswith(prefix) ...)` so the variable propagates without opening arbitrary host env forwarding. The test file tests/unit/app_server/test_agent_server_env_override.py gains a new test_allow_insecure_git_access_auto_forwarded that asserts ALLOW_INSECURE_GIT_ACCESS forwards while OTHER_VAR does not — a real assertion, not a tautology. Focused, well-scoped bug fix with corresponding test coverage.
